The 2nd ODI of the Afghanistan Tour of India 2026 marks the start of a only two match T20 series. Watch India vs Afghanistan 2nd T20 live in HD on tapmad, with official match coverage and uninterrupted streaming. These top-ranked white-ball teams, to begin with a strong squad, India will look to make the most of home conditions with a well-balanced squad, while Afghanistan aim to challenge with a disciplined unit capable of competing in all aspects of the game. Both teams will be eager to gain an early advantage in the series.
